Package
Description
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain
Core domain model for operating system introspection.
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware
Hardware value objects and the OSHardwareObject sealed interface.
  • Classes in io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain used by io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain
    Class
    Description
    MachineId
    Value object representing a stable machine identifier.
    Manufacturer
    Value object representing a hardware manufacturer.
    OperatingSystemObject
    Sealed interface for core operating system domain objects.
    SerialNumber
    Value object representing a hardware serial number.
